task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Mid-Century Modern in Palm Springs CA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1750000.00 and wholesale is $1400000.00. Product features: 3-bedroom restored mid-century home with pool and desert landscaping. Reference: https://www.compass.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Mid-Century Modern in Palm Springs CA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Mid-Century Modern in Palm Springs CA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
